description: Lab 4E MQTT protocol: web <-> broker <-> ESP <-> TM4C. Serial between ESP and TM4C uses cmd,value (w2b) and mode,hour,min,sec,mil (b2w).

w2b.description: Web to board. ESP subscribes to eid/w2b/# and forwards to TM4C as 'cmd,value\n'.

commands.action: Increment current mode field (alarm hr, alarm min, clock hr, clock min)
Set edit mode: 0=alarm hour, 1=alarm min, 2=clock hour, 3=clock min

b2w.description: Board to web. TM4C sends one line per tick: mode,hour,min,sec,mil. ESP publishes to eid/b2w/*.
